notes: Builds the σ (sum-of-points) and κ (P↦class of (P)−(O)) maps for Silverman III.3.4, plus the easy σ∘κ=id direction. The `equivProjectiveSmoothPoint`, `fintype` instance, and `card_eq_card_affine_point` in this file (for `W : WeierstrassCurve.Affine F`) are largely superseded by the corresponding declarations in `FintypeProjectiveSmoothPoint.lean`. `projectiveDivisorSum_kappaDivisor` is the single most widely consumed exported lemma, used across the Weil-pairing pipeline in at least 6 other files.
